VaultMart > Catalog > Standard Iron Pickaxe
Mining & Excavation

Standard Iron Pickaxe

14.99 gp
SKU: VM-MIN-001

Reliable forged-iron pickaxe suitable for limestone, sandstone, and upper chalk formations. Standard issue for entry-level miners. Hickory haft, hardened head, replaceable wedge.

Weight: 2.4 kg. Warranty: 90 days against head separation under normal load.
